## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.12.1

### 📷 Cameras
- Restores the default camera live view path to the legacy X-Sense `/device/startlive` stream endpoint.
- Keeps the experimental X-Sense WebRTC bridge behind the existing options-flow setting.
- Prevents unsupported `webrtc://` live URLs from being passed to Home Assistant's normal stream worker.

### ✅ Validation
- Adds regression coverage for the default stream-source endpoint and unsupported WebRTC URL rejection.
- Confirms the full Python test suite and the Go bridge test pass with these changes.
